channel.title: Index-Page on Berrytree.org
channel.description: Recent content in Index-Page on Berrytree.org

item.title: Berry Family Timelines — Wheel of Time
item.description: The Berry family timelines trace the journey of Robert and Elizabeth Cate Berry’s descendants across four centuries of American history. Use the Wheel of Time to navigate through the centuries — from the earliest Berry roots in Virginia and North Carolina, through westward expansion into Georgia, Alabama, Tennessee, and Texas, to the present day. Each era tells the story of a family shaped by the events of its time.

item.title: Family Tree Index
item.description:

Robert and Elizabeth Cate Berry's ten children with birth and death dates.

item.title: Extended Site Map
item.description:
Extended Site Map

Complete index of census records, document pages, ancestor pages, and research resources on berrytree.org.

1790 Census Index#

1790 CENSUS INDEX 1790 Census for Orange Co., NC were lost, this is a compilation of “Tax Records.” Records of the Bureau of the Census. Group RG-29 National Archives, Washington, DC 20408 Tax

item.title: Known Surnames of Berry Inlaws
item.description:
291 Families Connected to Our Berry Line

Spanning eight generations from Princess Anne County, Virginia to points across the American South and West.

The following 291 surnames represent the families who married into the Berry line descending from Robert and Elizabeth Cate Berry of Orange County, North Carolina. These names have been gathered from census records, marriage bonds, wills, deeds, family bibles, and correspondence with descendants over many years of research. If you recognize your family name in this list, you may be connected to our Berry family. We love meeting new cousins and sharing research, so please reach out through our Contact page.

item.title: By Family Line
item.description:
Gen 1 Robert and Mary Williamson Berry, Princess Anne County, Virginia.

Gen 2 Robert and Elizabeth Cate Berry, Orange County, North Carolina.

Gen 3 — Mary Berry and First Husband George Waggoner, NC.

Gen 3 — Mary Berry and Second Husband James Camp, NC & SC.

item.title: Resources
item.description:
Genealogy Resources#

A curated guide for researchers tracing the Robert and Elizabeth Cate Berry family line, and for general genealogical research in North Carolina, Virginia, Georgia, Alabama, and Tennessee.

Essential Online Databases#

Resource Description
FamilySearch.org Free access to billions of records; strong NC/VA colonial holdings
Ancestry.com Census records, vital records, trees (subscription)
FindMyPast Strong British Isles records, useful for PAC-era origins research
Fold3 Military records; Revolutionary War, Civil War pension files
HeritageQuest Online Free via many public libraries, US Census and genealogy books
WikiTree Collaborative, source-cited family tree; Berry family profiles exist
FamilyTreeDNA Y-DNA and mtDNA testing, Berry Y-DNA project active here
23andMe Autosomal DNA; cousin matching
GEDmatch Cross-platform DNA comparison tool

North Carolina Specific#

Resource Description
NC State Archives Land grants, court minutes, wills, deed books
NC Digital Collections Digitized state records
NC GenWeb County-level genealogical resources
Orange County NC Records Direct link to Orange County court minutes, tax lists
Granville District Records Critical for Berry land grants, 1748–1763
NC Marriage Bonds Orange County marriage bonds on FamilySearch

Virginia (Princess Anne County Origins)#

Resource Description
Library of Virginia PAC deed books, wills, vestry records
VA GenWeb — Princess Anne County Community-maintained resources
Lynnhaven Parish Vestry Book Search FamilySearch — documents Samuel Hollowell & Robert Berry

DNA Research for the Berry Line#

Our Y-DNA project documents living male descendants of Robert Berry. If you are a male Berry (or believe you may descend through a male Berry line), consider testing.

item.title: Contact Us
item.description:
Send Us a Message#

Use the form below to reach the Berry family research team. We’ll respond as soon as we can.

item.title: Berry Family Name List
item.description:
Berry Family Descendant Directory

All known descendants of Robert and Elizabeth Cate Berry, organized by generation and family line.

Robert Berry & Mary Williamson Robert Berry & Mary Williamson’s Children: 2nd Generation:

  1. Robert Berry
  2. Richard Berry Robert & Elizabeth Cate Berry’s Children: 3 rd Generation:
  3. Mary Berry
  4. Robert Berry Jr.
  5. John Berry
  6. IsaacBerry
  7. Joshua Berry
  8. Elizabeth Berry
  9. Thomas Berry
  10. David J. Berry
  11. William Berry
  12. Henry Berry

William & Hannah Cate Berry’s Children 4th Generation:

item.title: Berry Marriage Bonds
item.description:
Berry Marriage Bonds

Marriage bond records from the Grooms Book of Berry Marriages, now integrated into the Family Timeline.

The marriage bond data that was previously on this page has been migrated to the Family Timeline. All 39 Berry marriage bonds from the Grooms Book are now searchable and filterable using the “marriage” category filter on the timeline.

item.title: Berrytree.org
item.description:
Descendants of Robert & Elizabeth Cate Berry Orange County, North Carolina · est. 1757

If you’re a descendant of Robert and Elizabeth Cate Berry, welcome home. This site was built for you — by family, for family — to preserve the story of where we came from and the people who made us who we are. Whether you’re a lifelong researcher or just discovering your Berry roots, you belong here.

item.title: By Family Line
item.description:
Gen 1 Robert Berry × Mary Williamson — Princess Anne County, Virginia
Gen 2 Robert Berry × Elizabeth Cate — Orange County, North Carolina

  • Gen 3 Mary Berry and First Husband George Waggoner,NC.

  • Gen 3 Mary Berry and Second Husband, James Camp NC & SC.

item.title: Family Homes
item.description:
Berry Family Homes & Historic Places

Houses, stores, and schools built or occupied by Berry family descendants, spanning the 1760s through the early 1900s.

These photographs preserve the homes and gathering places of the Berry family across multiple states and generations. Some of these structures still stand today; others survive only in these images. If you recognize a home or have additional photos, we’d love to hear from you.

item.title: Generation Five
item.description:
Generation Five — Great-Grandchildren

Fourth generation descendants of Robert and Elizabeth Cate Berry, organized by family line.

This page lists the fifth generation of the Berry family, the great-grandchildren of Robert and Elizabeth Cate Berry. Each section follows one of the ten Gen 3 family lines.

item.title: Generation Four
item.description:
Generation Four — 33 First Cousins

Grandchildren of Robert and Elizabeth Cate Berry, listed by family line with spouse information.

This page lists the fourth generation of the Berry family, the 33 grandchildren of Robert and Elizabeth Cate Berry. Each section follows one of the ten Gen 3 family lines. Where individual ancestor pages exist, names are linked.

item.title: Lookalikes
item.description:
Berry Family Lookalikes

Striking physical resemblances between descendants from different sons of Robert Berry, separated by over 200 years.

There have been some interesting developments resulting from our Berry DNA project. These photographs show remarkable physical similarities between Berry descendants from entirely different family lines.

item.title: Page Updates
item.description:
Site Update History

A running log of new pages, content additions, and research updates. Latest entries are at the top.

If you have pictures or information about your family line, we’d love to hear from you through our Contact page.

  • 4/04/2026 Created James Thomas Wilson page and updated Pattie Berry Wilson page

item.title: Robert Berry and Elizabeth Cate Berry's Children
item.description:
Robert and Elizabeth Cate Berry's Ten Children

Generation 3 of the Berry family, circa 1760–1858. All ten children were born in Orange County, North Carolina.

  • Gen 1 Robert Berry × Mary Williamson — Princess Anne County, Virginia
  • Gen 2 Robert Berry × Elizabeth Cate — Orange County, North Carolina

3. Mary Berry - Born cir 1760 - 1812 Born Orange County North Carolina about 1759 5 Children with Spouse # 2 James Kemp/Camp 1768 - 1833 ..4. John Camp b: about 1783 in Orange County ..4. Sarah Camp Humphries b: November 9th 1785 ..4. Robert Berry Camp b: about 1787 ..4. Stirling Camp b: October 22nd 1793 ..4. Joseph Camp b: about 1795

item.title: Undeveloped Family Lines
item.description:
Undeveloped Family Lines

Berry descendant lines with known lineage data that have not yet been fully developed on berrytree.org.

The following Berry descendant lines have partial lineage information but have not been researched or expanded into full ancestor pages. If you are connected to any of these lines and can contribute information, we’d love to hear from you.
